---
name: Feature / idea
about: Suggest a mechanic, class, map, or improvement
title: "[idea] "
labels: enhancement
---

**The idea**
What you'd like to see. If it maps to a `ROADMAP.md` item, link it.

**Why**
What it adds to the game (tactical depth, clarity, content, replay…).

**Notes**
- Remember the constraint: **no asset pipeline** — sprites/sound/art are defined
  in code, so visual/audio content is data, not image/audio files.
- If it's a new class/skill/map, see the patterns in
  [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../../CONTRIBUTING.md).
